appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/ast-cache-config.md to reflect the 3x calibration multiplier in parsed-source cache entry size estimation (was describing raw byte length as conservative lower bound, now documents the multiplier-based tracking).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a lightweight path in backend-worker skill for infrastructure-only features (git housekeeping, config commits) where TDD-first and branch-merge-to-main steps are not applicable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature commit-factory-infrastructure required only git add/commit of .factory/ files. Worker correctly deviated from TDD and branching steps but noted the skill should acknowledge non-code features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding .gitignore entries for generated audit report files (*_audit_report.md) to prevent accidental commits and manual stash workarounds.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature commit-factory-infrastructure worker had to stash ast_gnn_audit_report.md and backend_audit_report.md to achieve clean working tree. Feature description said 'Skip audit report files', implying they are known generated artifacts not meant for version control.
